content: But that being said, I'll continue full stop. I started school in a public school in my neighborhood in the first grade after I suppose attending kindergarten for a year before that. However, my parents transferred my older brother and me to a private Baptist school where I spent the next seven plus years through the end of eighth grade, full stop. At that time, my father built a new house.And we moved 20 miles away to a smaller town and were put into public school.
